mapper.select: SELECT * FROM books ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM books ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT * FROM books WHERE 1=1
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (title, author, isbn, publisher, publish_date, category, total_copies, available_copies, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{publisher}, #{publishDate}, #{category}, #{totalCopies}, #{availableCopies}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET available_copies = available_copies + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE isbn = #{isbn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE available_copies > 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE 1=1
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND category = #{category}
